name: Griefer & Finn McCool
description:
Hooray! You’re now dating a plant and a baseball player! Now what…?

Photo from Pinterest.

I don’t really care if this has too many errors, just want to post something after not doing so for so long. Sorry for being gone! <3

I head-cannoned Griefer’s peep looking like a shampoo ginger lily plant if you ever needed to know, something like this.

Enjoy <3
